faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Answers to the most common questions about the branding process, prices, and other topics.

faqItems.question: Why are the prices not fixed?
faqItems.answer: Every project is unique. The price is calculated individually depending on the complexity of the project, the scope of work, and your tasks. We offer the best solution for your brand.

faqItems.question: How is the work process structured?
faqItems.answer: The process is divided into stages: research, strategy, visual style, communication. Each stage is agreed upon with you, and you have full control over the process.

faqItems.question: Can I order just a logo?
faqItems.answer: We create not just a logo, but a complete identification system that makes the brand recognizable and effective. This creates long-term value for your business.

faqItems.question: What are the payment terms?
faqItems.answer: The standard scheme is 50% prepayment, 50% after project delivery. We can also discuss individual terms for your convenience.

faqItems.question: How long does the work take?
faqItems.answer: The timing depends on the type of service. For example, creating a logo takes 2-4 weeks, brand strategy starts from 8 weeks. The final deadline is determined after project approval.

faqItems.question: Is there support after the project is completed?
faqItems.answer: Yes, within 1 month after the project completion, we provide free advice and assistance on the correct use of brand materials.

faq.ctaDesc: Got answers to all your questions? Let's discuss your project and take your brand to the next level.

metadata.title: Mini-Test: Is Your Business Ready for Branding? | Jon.Branding
metadata.description: Answer a few simple questions and find out how ready your business is for branding, its strengths and weaknesses.

questions.question: Is the main idea or mission of your business expressed in one sentence?

options.text: Yes, clearly and understandably for everyone
No, I haven't thought about it

questions.question: Can you clearly envision your target audience (ideal client)?

options.text: Yes, I know their needs and desires
No, I try to sell to everyone

questions.question: What specific advantages does your brand have over competitors?

options.text: I have at least 2-3 clear advantages
I only stand out by price

questions.question: Does your visual identity (logo, colors, design) reflect your business values?

options.text: No, I haven't paid attention to this

questions.question: Do your customers have a consistent and positive opinion of you?

options.text: Yes, my brand reputation is strong
It varies, sometimes there are negative reviews
I don't know, I haven't conducted a survey

bad.title: You need help (5-8 points)
bad.description: Your brand's foundation is weak. You undoubtedly need professional help to stand out from competitors and win customer loyalty. Let's fix this together!

medium.title: Good potential, but there are gaps (9-12 points)
medium.description: You have a good foundation, but your brand can be stronger and more effective. Let's fill the existing gaps and take your business to the next level.

good.title: Excellent! Your brand's foundation is solid (13-15 points)
good.description: Congratulations! You are on the right track with branding. Now it's time to strengthen this foundation and become a market leader. We will help you with this.

result.afterSubmitText: Our specialist will contact you soon for a detailed analysis of your test results and to provide personal recommendations.

metadata.title: Brand Strategy | Jon.Branding
metadata.description: Brand strategy is a business growth tool. Turn your brand from just beautiful into a working system.

brandStrategyPage.title: Brand Strategy
brandStrategyPage.subtitle: A strong brand is a clear idea that inspires, unites, and helps a business grow.
brandStrategyPage.section1_title: Brand strategy is a business growth tool
brandStrategyPage.section1_p1: Every ambitious company has its goals. For some, it's capturing a certain market share; for others, it's brand awareness, expanding into new territories, and so on.
brandStrategyPage.section1_p2: Brand strategy is what helps a company achieve these goals, to become not just a product or service, but something more — a part of its customers' lives, a carrier of a recognizable image.
brandStrategyPage.section1_p3: Most importantly, it allows for the systemization of marketing expenses, abandoning tools, channels, and ideas that do not support the company's positioning and, therefore, do not deserve the cost.
brandStrategyPage.section2_title: Brand strategy is necessary for any business
brandStrategyPage.section2_p1: Brand strategy is necessary for both new and long-existing companies.
brandStrategyPage.section2_p2: For startups, it helps to define their mission, values, and identity from the very beginning, to occupy the right position in the market, and to attract customers.
brandStrategyPage.section2_p3: For large companies, strategy is a tool for growth and reputation management. In this case, it helps to maintain relevance, adapt to changes, and build strong relationships with the audience. Regardless of business size, brand strategy answers the main question: why should a customer choose you?
brandStrategyPage.process_subtitle: In our agency, we are convinced that branding is more than just creating a logo. Branding is not a one-time task, but a cyclical process. Each stage plays its key role, and skipping any of them can weaken the brand and its market position. But if everything is done correctly and consistently, branding helps the business grow and makes it easier to manage many processes, from product production to marketing.

process_steps.title: Analysis and research
process_steps.description: This is the first and most important stage where data about the market, competitors, and audience is collected. Without this, it's impossible to define the brand's uniqueness and understand its target audience.

process_steps.title: Brand platform formation
process_steps.description: Here the brand's mission, values, and unique proposition are born - this is the foundation that defines its character and voice. Without a clear platform, all subsequent actions risk being disjointed and unconvincing.

process_steps.title: Strategy development
process_steps.description: The strategy answers how the brand will interact with the audience and through which channels it will communicate. This systematizes communication, making it targeted and effective.

process_steps.title: Visual identification
process_steps.description: Translating the brand's meanings into a visual language - logo, colors, fonts, and graphic elements. This makes the brand recognizable and different from competitors.

process_steps.title: Implementation and integration
process_steps.description: Creating a brand is just the beginning. It is important to correctly integrate it into the company and contact points so that it becomes part of the corporate culture and communication with customers.

metadata.title: Corporate Identity | Jon.Branding
metadata.description: We don't just create beautiful pictures; we develop a systematic visual style that works for your brand and delivers results. Make your brand recognizable and memorable through a logo, colors, fonts, and other elements.

corporateStylePage.title: Corporate Identity Development
corporateStylePage.subtitle: One of the key elements of a brand is its visual component. It is what turns ideas, meanings, and values into images that can be seen, felt, and remembered.
corporateStylePage.section1_title: Brand perception starts with the picture
corporateStylePage.section1_p1: In the modern world, visual information is perceived and absorbed faster than text or words. We live in an age of instant impressions: it takes people a second to form an opinion about a brand, and this often happens through its visual image.
corporateStylePage.section1_p2: For an idea to be consolidated in the audience's mind, it's not enough to just talk about it — it's important to reinforce it with visual elements. A well-designed corporate identity allows you to demonstrate brand values without extra explanations, instantly evoking the necessary emotions and associations.
corporateStylePage.section2_p1: It's not just about beauty, but about efficiency, meaning, and control. To ensure a brand remains multifaceted and consistent in developing its visual image, a set of graphic elements must be created.
corporateStylePage.section2_p2: Such a set is always selected individually, depending on the business's tasks and capabilities. The minimum set includes a logo, colors, fonts, photo style, style of advertising media, and other elements that create a cohesive image.
corporateStylePage.section2_p3: When a visual style is built clearly and consistently, it becomes a powerful tool for managing the brand's image and communication. When all its elements are aligned, the brand is perceived as professional, reliable, and recognizable.
corporateStylePage.process_title: How do we create a corporate identity?
corporateStylePage.process_subtitle: We take a systematic approach to developing a corporate identity so that every detail works for brand recognition and its strategy.

process_steps.title: Research and concept
process_steps.description: We analyze the audience, market, competitors, and the brand's position. We identify the key meanings and ideas that should be reflected in the visual style.

process_steps.title: Visual code development
process_steps.description: We create the logo, corporate colors, typography, graphics, iconography, and layout principles that form a cohesive brand image.

process_steps.title: Corporate identity system
process_steps.description: We develop flexible elements that help maintain the consistency of the visual image across all formats — from packaging to the digital environment.

process_steps.title: Finalization and guideline
process_steps.description: We create a guideline with rules for using the style so that the brand maintains a unified image on any carrier.

corporateStylePage.cta_title: Corporate identity is a growth tool
corporateStylePage.cta_description: Brands with a strong identity are recognized faster, remembered longer, and inspire more trust. We create not just a visual style, but a tool that helps the brand grow, be consistent, and manageable.

metadata.title: Naming | Jon.Branding
metadata.description: Choosing a memorable and strong name for a brand. A good name doesn't just sound beautiful; it conveys the essence, is memorable, and helps the brand stand out among competitors.

namingPage.title: Naming — A Strong Brand Name
namingPage.subtitle: A brand name is the first impression of it, its energy, character, and the idea expressed in a word. A good name doesn't just sound beautiful; it conveys the essence, is memorable, and helps the brand stand out among competitors.
namingPage.section1_title: The name is part of the brand strategy
namingPage.section1_p1: A good name supports associations, recognition, and emotional connection. Creating such a name is a strategic work that takes into account the brand's positioning, the market, the target audience, and the company's long-term goals.
namingPage.section1_p2: We approach naming as an important element of branding. It's not a random collection of ideas, but a thoughtful work where every word has meaning.
namingPage.section2_title: Every strong name starts with an idea
namingPage.section2_p1: Before searching for a name, we ask the main question: what is this brand about? What feelings and images should it evoke? Therefore, we carefully analyze the product, its audience, and the environment to determine the semantic directions for finding the ideal name.
namingPage.section2_p2: It can be built on an emotion, a metaphor, a cultural code, professional language, or even a play on words. The main thing is that it works, conveys the essence, and helps the brand be remembered.
namingPage.process_title: How do we create a name?
namingPage.process_subtitle: In our agency, naming development is a clear process where every stage is important:

process_steps.title: Research
process_steps.description: We study the market, audience, competitors, and semantic directions.

process_steps.title: Concept formation
process_steps.description: We determine possible vectors for finding a name.

process_steps.title: Idea generation and testing
process_steps.description: We create a list of options, testing them for sound, meaning, and potential.

process_steps.title: Verification and finalization
process_steps.description: We analyze the possibility of registration, check domains and associations, and select the best ones.

namingPage.check_title: Verifying a name is as important as creating one
namingPage.check_subtitle: Even a brilliant idea won't work if it can't be registered or has undesirable associations. We check names against several key parameters:

check_points.title: Legal clarity
check_points.description: We analyze the possibility of trademark registration.

check_points.title: Domains and digital environment
check_points.description: We check the availability of names in the digital environment.

check_points.title: Meaning and associations
check_points.description: We check readability, sound, possible associative array, cultural perception, and compliance with the brand category.

metadata.title: Trademark Calculator | Jon.Branding
metadata.description: Calculate the approximate costs associated with trademark registration (state fees and service charges) in Uzbekistan.

patentCalculatorPage.title: Trademark Registration Calculator
patentCalculatorPage.subtitle: Naming is a creative process, and patenting is a legal one. With the help of a patent specialist on our team, calculate the approximate costs associated with trademark registration (state fees and service charges) here.

trademarkCalculator.activityHelp: This helps in determining the classes.
trademarkCalculator.totalCostTitle: Estimated total cost for a 10-year patent
trademarkCalculator.totalCostNote: Includes all state fees and service charges
trademarkCalculator.importantNoteText: All prices depend on the Base Calculation Value (BCV) set by the Ministry of Justice of the Republic of Uzbekistan and are subject to change. This calculator is not a public offer and is for informational purposes only.
trademarkCalculator.error_phone: Please enter a valid phone number.
trademarkCalculator.success_toast_desc: Your request has been received. We will contact you shortly!

metadata.title: Packaging Design | Jon.Branding
metadata.description: We don't just create beautiful packaging; we create a powerful marketing tool that sells your product. Differentiate your brand from competitors and win customers' affection through packaging design.

packagingPage.title: Packaging Design Development
packagingPage.subtitle: In a highly competitive environment, packaging often becomes a key marketing tool. It distinguishes the brand on the shelf, tells its story, and connects with the audience at first glance.
packagingPage.section1_title: Packaging is more than just a carrier of brand identity
packagingPage.section1_p1: Packaging is the first contact with the brand at points of sale, a visual appeal that instantly creates an impression of the product. In many cases, it is the packaging that determines a person's decision to buy.
packagingPage.section1_p2: The goal of our agency is not just to create an aesthetic and beautiful package, but to create an effective tool that meets business objectives and contributes to its growth.
packagingPage.process_subtitle: We approach packaging development not as a separate design, but as a complex system that should work for the business and meet audience expectations. Our process includes several key stages:

process_steps.title: Analysis and strategy
process_steps.description: We study your product, audience, competitors, and the environment in which the packaging is used. We analyze the visual code of the category.

process_steps.title: Concept and design
process_steps.description: Based on the collected data, we develop visual ideas that reflect the essence of the product: color, graphics, typography, etc.

process_steps.title: Finalization and preparation
process_steps.description: We thoroughly work out all the technical aspects of the chosen concept (adaptation to different formats, preparation for printing).

packagingPage.cta_title: Packaging doesn't just attract attention, it sells
packagingPage.cta_description: Good packaging design is not just beautiful decoration, but a tool that works for the business. We develop a functional, strategically thought-out design where the packaging serves as a full-fledged sales tool.
